goal: is_cauchy_series(a) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { k0 <= x1 and x1 <= x2 implies sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x1.until(x2), a)).abs < x0 } } }
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { not k0 <= x2 or not x2 <= x3 or sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x2.until(x3), x0)).abs < x1 } } } = is_cauchy_series(x0) }(a)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { k0 <= x0 and x0 <= x1 implies sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x0.until(x1), a)).abs < eps } }
proof: (forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not k0 <= x1 or not x1 <= x2 or sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x1.until(x2), a)).abs < x0 } } } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { x1 <= k0 and k0 <= k1 and not sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](k0.until(k1), a)).abs < x0 } }) }(eps)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { k0 <= x0 and x0 <= x1 implies sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x0.until(x1), a)).abs < eps } }
partial[Real](a, j) - partial[Real](a, i) = sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](i.until(j), a))
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat -> Real) { not x0 <= x1 or sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x0.until(x1), x2)) = partial[Real](x2, x1) - partial[Real](x2, x0) }(i, j, a)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not n <= x0 or not x0 <= x1 or sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x0.until(x1), a)).abs < eps }(i, j)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs < x2 = x0.is_close(x1, x2) }(p(j), p(i), eps)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 < x1 or x0 <= x1 }[Nat](i, j)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 < x1 or x1 <= x0 }(i, j)

goal: partial[Real](a, i) - partial[Real](a, j) = sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](j.until(i), a))
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat -> Real) { not x0 <= x1 or sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x0.until(x1), x2)) = partial[Real](x2, x1) - partial[Real](x2, x0) }(j, i, a)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not n <= x0 or not x0 <= x1 or sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x0.until(x1), a)).abs < eps }(j, i)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs < x2 = x0.is_close(x1, x2) }(p(i), p(j), eps)

goal: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { n <= k0 and n <= k1 and not p(k0).is_close(p(k1), eps) } or cauchy_bound(p, n, eps)
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Real) { forall(x3: Nat, x4: Nat) { not x0 <= x3 or not x0 <= x4 or x1(x3).is_close(x1(x4), x2) } = cauchy_bound(x1, x0, x2) }(n, p, eps)
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat) { n <= w0 and n <= k0 and not p(w0).is_close(p(k0), eps) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { n <= w0 and n <= w1 and not p(w0).is_close(p(w1), eps) }
let w2: Nat satisfy { n <= w0 and n <= w2 and not p(w0).is_close(p(w2), eps) }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not n <= x0 or not n <= x1 or p(x0).is_close(p(x1), eps) }(w0, w2)
function(x0: Nat) { not cauchy_bound(p, x0, eps) }(n)
function(x0: Nat -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { cauchy_bound(x0, k0, x1) } } = converges(x0) }(p)
function(x0: Nat -> Real) { not converges(x0) or is_cauchy_seq(x0) }(partial[Real](a))
function(x0: Nat -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { is_cauchy_seq_at(x0, x1) } = is_cauchy_seq(x0) }(p)
(forall(x0: Real) { is_cauchy_seq_at(p, x0) } = true)
function(x0: Real) { is_cauchy_seq_at(p, x0) }(eps)

goal: is_cauchy_seq_at(p, eps) = (eps.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { k0 <= x0 and k0 <= x1 implies p(x0).is_close(p(x1), eps) } })
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Nat -> Real) { (not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { not k0 <= x2 or not k0 <= x3 or x1(x2).is_close(x1(x3), x0) } }) = is_cauchy_seq_at(x1, x0) }(eps, p)

goal: eps.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { k0 <= x0 and k0 <= x1 implies p(x0).is_close(p(x1), eps) } }
exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { k0 <= x0 and k0 <= x1 implies p(x0).is_close(p(x1), eps) } }
exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { k0 <= x0 and k0 <= x1 implies p(x0).is_close(p(x1), eps) } }

proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not x0 <= x1 or not x1 <= x2 or x0 <= x2 }(n, k, m)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not n <= x0 or not n <= x1 or p(x0).is_close(p(x1), eps) }(k, m)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs < x2 = x0.is_close(x1, x2) }(p(m), p(k), eps)

goal: partial[Real](a, m) - partial[Real](a, k) = sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](k.until(m), a))
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat -> Real) { not x0 <= x1 or sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x0.until(x1), x2)) = partial[Real](x2, x1) - partial[Real](x2, x0) }(k, m, a)

goal: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { n <= k0 and k0 <= k1 and not sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](k0.until(k1), a)).abs < eps } or forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { n <= x0 and x0 <= x1 implies sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x0.until(x1), a)).abs < eps }
proof: let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat) { n <= w0 and w0 <= k0 and not sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](w0.until(k0), a)).abs < eps } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { n <= w0 and w0 <= w1 and not sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](w0.until(w1), a)).abs < eps }
(forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not n <= x0 or not x0 <= x1 or sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x0.until(x1), a)).abs < eps } = true)
function(x0: Nat) { forall(x1: Nat) { not n <= x0 or not x0 <= x1 or sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x0.until(x1), a)).abs < eps } = true }(w0)
let w2: Nat satisfy { n <= w0 and w0 <= w2 and not sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](w0.until(w2), a)).abs < eps }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not (n <= x0 and x0 <= x1 and not sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x0.until(x1), a)).abs < eps) }(w0, w2)

goal: n <= k and k <= m implies sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](k.until(m), a)).abs < eps
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not n <= x0 or not x0 <= x1 or sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x0.until(x1), a)).abs < eps }(k, m)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { k0 <= x0 and x0 <= x1 implies sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x0.until(x1), a)).abs < eps } }
proof: function(x0: Nat) { not forall(x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not x0 <= x1 or not x1 <= x2 or sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x1.until(x2), a)).abs < eps } }(n)
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat) { n <= w0 and w0 <= k0 and not sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](w0.until(k0), a)).abs < eps } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { n <= w0 and w0 <= w1 and not sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](w0.until(w1), a)).abs < eps }
let w2: Nat satisfy { n <= w0 and w0 <= w2 and not sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](w0.until(w2), a)).abs < eps }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not n <= x0 or not x0 <= x1 or sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x0.until(x1), a)).abs < eps }(w0, w2)

function(x0: Nat -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { not k0 <= x2 or not x2 <= x3 or sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](x2.until(x3), x0)).abs < x1 } } } = is_cauchy_series(x0) }(a)
function(x0: Nat -> Real) { not converges(x0) or is_cauchy_seq(x0) }(partial[Real](a))
function(x0: Nat -> Real) { not is_cauchy_series(x0) or is_cauchy_seq(partial[Real](x0)) }(a)
function(x0: Nat -> Real) { converges(partial[Real](abs_fn(x0))) = lib(real.abs_conv).absolutely_converges(x0) }(a)
function(x0: Nat -> Real) { not is_cauchy_series(x0) or converges(partial[Real](x0)) }(abs_fn(a))
function(x0: Nat -> Real) { not lib(real.abs_conv).absolutely_converges(x0) or converges(partial[Real](x0)) }(a)
